report.summary: Cycle 10 standup: 4 agent runs since v8 (build-v8, design, community-v7, eod-v7). 2 new learn guides shipped (Pectra Upgrade 694 lines + Crypto Tax 1,125 lines), 14 total learn pages now on disk (8,946+ lines). UX audit fixed 6 pages (stablecoin yield tracker refactored, OG meta fixes, stale dates). 5 tweets #280-284 scheduled Apr 20-26. 2 social cards + 1 OG image created. 40 total agent cycles today. P0 blocker persists: 39 uncommitted files need commit+push.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA FROM V8: 4 agent runs completed — build-v8 (2 new learn guides: Pectra Upgrade 694 lines + Crypto Tax 1,125 lines), design (UX audit of 6 pages, stablecoin yield tracker refactored to server+client split, OG image fixes on 4 learn pages, stale March→April date updates, 1 new OG image), community-v7 (5 tweets #280-284 for Apr 20-26 + newsletter v9 + 2 social cards), eod-v7 (QA confirming 14 learn pages, 40+ uncommitted files, no regressions).

CONTENT PIPELINE: 14 learn guides now on disk (8,946+ lines, up from 12 / 7,127 lines at v8). Latest 2: Ethereum Pectra Upgrade Guide (EIP-7702, flexible staking, blob scaling, Fusaka roadmap) + Crypto Tax Guide 2026 (IRS rules, Form 1099-DA, DeFi/staking tax, loss harvesting — 14 days to Apr 15 deadline).

SOCIAL PIPELINE: 284 tweets drafted all-time (+5 this cycle). Apr 20-26 now scheduled: post-tax-deadline sentiment divergence, RWA Tokenization 5-tweet thread ($26B+), Glamsterdam preview, Magic Eden shutdown commentary, weekend F&G stat. Newsletter v9 supplement drafted. 2 new social cards (RWA $26B+, Fear & Greed Divergence).

UX/DESIGN: Stablecoin yield tracker split from monolithic 'use client' to server page + client component (enables metadata/SEO). OG image extension mismatches fixed on 2 pages. Missing openGraph images added to 2 pages. Stale 'March 2026' dates updated to 'April 2026' on 3 pages. 1 new OG image created (omnichain-defi).
PUBLISH STATUS: 626 published slugs (unchanged). PUBLISH_QUEUE empty. 14 learn pages on disk awaiting deploy. 39 uncommitted files in git (13 modified, 26 untracked).
BUILD HEALTH: 141 TS errors (stable, non-blocking). Latest commit 3b2dd28 unchanged all day.

MARKET DATA (last known, egress blocked): BTC ~$68,224-$68,688, ETH ~$2,104-$2,135, F&G 8 (Extreme Fear, 60+ day streak). Q1 BTC return -24%. RWA tokenized $26B+. Pectra shipped May 2025 (Fusaka next). Tax deadline Apr 15.

SEO NOTE: No GSC or Vercel Analytics available from sandbox. Crypto Tax Guide is highest-urgency content — 14 days to Apr 15 deadline, Form 1099-DA confusion driving peak searches. Deploy is the only constraint.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: 10th standup of Apr 1. 40 total agent cycles today: standup ×10, build ×5, publish ×4, design ×7, community ×7, eod ×7.

V8 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Commit & Deploy — NO CHANGE (P0 blocker persists across all 10 standups, 39 uncommitted files need push). (2) Batch-scaffold 109 missing page.tsx — NOT STARTED (carried over all day). (3) Capitalize on Pectra + Tax window — IN PROGRESS (14 learn guides + 284 tweets + OG images + social cards all ready, blocked on deploy).

COMPLETED SINCE V8: Build-v8 created 2 guides (Pectra 694 + Tax 1,125 = 1,819 lines). Design ran full UX audit of 6 pages (stablecoin yield tracker refactor, 4 OG fixes, 3 stale date updates, 1 new OG image). Community-v7 drafted 5 tweets + 2 social cards + newsletter v9. EOD-v7 ran QA, confirmed no regressions.

P0 BLOCKER (PERSISTENT ALL DAY — 10TH CYCLE): 39 uncommitted files (13 modified + 26 untracked) need commit+push. All 14 learn guides, OG images, social cards, UX fixes, yield tracker refactor — everything is ready but nothing deploys until this happens. Production still running Mar 24 deployment.
P1 CARRY-OVER (UNCHANGED): 109 published slugs missing page.tsx (18% indexing gap). Carried over across all 10 standups without action.

P2: defi-yields fallback gap. 2 slug-mismatched pages. 141 TS errors (stable). ~55 older learn pages with potentially missing OG images. Legacy breadcrumbs on some pages. Stablecoin yield tracker search not debounced.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT & DEPLOY (P0, CRITICAL, 10TH CONSECUTIVE CYCLE): 14 learn guides (8,946+ lines), 14+ OG images, 284 tweets, UX fixes, yield tracker refactor — all sitting in working tree (39 uncommitted files). Tax deadline is 14 days away — Crypto Tax Guide MUST be indexed ASAP to capture peak 'crypto tax 2026' searches. This is a ~3-minute action (commit+push) that unlocks the entire day's $2,983 of agent output. ESCALATION: This has been the #1 priority across all 10 standup cycles today without resolution. Requires human intervention.

PRIORITY 2 — BATCH-SCAFFOLD 109 MISSING PAGE.TSX: 18% indexing gap. Carried over across all 10 cycles. Recommend: next build cycle after deploy does ONLY scaffolding — no new content until gap is closed. This is the highest-ROI non-deploy action available.

PRIORITY 3 — CONTENT CALENDAR EXTENSION (APR 27-MAY 3): Social calendar now covers Apr 7-26 (3 full weeks). Gap starts Apr 27. Next community cycle should draft Apr 27-May 3 content. Topics: post-Pectra developer adoption, Layer 2 fee comparison refresh, bear market portfolio strategies, May Day crypto sentiment.
